zh.Fauntleroy's Marsh, Alveson, Dorset, Eng: 英國英格蘭多瑟特馬希
zh.Marsh, Dorset, England: 英國英格蘭多瑟特馬希
zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter Fauntleroy於1475年出生在英國多瑟特時，他的父親John Fauntleroy Esq59歲，母親Baroness Elizabeth Wadham50歲。他於大約1505年與Jane Flammock在英國可瓦爾爾根結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1563年在英國英格蘭多瑟特馬希享年88歲，埋葬在英國多瑟特福爾可。

zh-hans.Fauntleroy's Marsh, Alveson, Dorset, Eng: 英国英格兰多瑟特馬希
zh-hans.Marsh, Dorset, England: 英国英格兰多瑟特馬希
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peter Fauntleroy于1475年出生在英国多瑟特时，他的父亲John Fauntleroy Esq59岁，母亲Baroness Elizabeth Wadham50岁。他于大约1505年与Jane Flammock在英国可瓦爾爾根结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1563年在英国英格兰多瑟特馬希享年88岁，埋葬在英国多瑟特福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Fauntleroy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Old French phrase enfant le roi ‘son of the king’, denoting a royal prince and, as a surname, a member of a royal prince's household.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter Fauntleroy was born in 1475, in Dorset, England, his father, John Fauntleroy Esq, was 59 and his mother, Baroness Elizabeth Wadham, was 50. He married Jane Flammock about 1505, in Heligan, Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1563, in Marsh, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 88, and was buried in Folke, Dorset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter Fauntleroy est né en 1475, à Dorset, Angleterre, son père, John Fauntleroy Esq, avait 59 ans et sa mère, Baroness Elizabeth Wadham, avait 50 ans. Il a épousé Jane Flammock environ 1505, à Heligan, Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1563, à Marsh, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterré à Folke, Dorset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Peter Fauntleroy 1475 in Dorset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Fauntleroy Esq 59 und seine Mutter Baroness Elizabeth Wadham 50. Er hat um 1505 in Heligan, Cornwall, England Jane Flammock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1563 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Marsh, Dorset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Folke, Dorset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Peter Fauntleroy è nato il nel 1475 nel Dorset, England, il suo padre, John Fauntleroy Esq, aveva 59 anni e il suo madre, Baroness Elizabeth Wadham, aveva 50 anni. Lui sposato Jane Flammock circa 1505, nel Heligan, Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1563, nel Marsh, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 88 anni, e fu sepolto a Folke, Dorset, England.

ja.Marsh, Dorset, England: イギリスイギリスドールセトマーッシュ
ja.lifeSummary: Peter Fauntleroyが1475年にイギリスドールセトで生まれた時，父John Fauntleroy Esqは59歳，母Baroness Elizabeth Wadhamは50歳であった。約1505年にイギリスコルンワルヘリガンでJane Flammockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1563年にイギリスイギリスドールセトマーッシュで88歳で死去し，イギリスドールセトフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Peter Fauntleroy(이)가 1475년 영국 도르세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Fauntleroy Esq(은)는 59세였고, 그의 어머니 Baroness Elizabeth Wadham(은)는 50세였다. 그는 대략 1505년 영국 코른월 헬익아에서 Jane Flammock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1563년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 마시에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 도르세트 폴크에 묻혔다.

mn.Fauntleroy's Marsh, Alveson, Dorset, Eng: Marsh, Dorseteschyre, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Marsh, Dorset, England: Marsh, Dorseteschyre, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peter Fauntleroy nasceu em 1475, em Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Fauntleroy Esq, tinha 59 anos e sua mãe, Baroness Elizabeth Wadham, tinha 50 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Flammock aproximadamente 1505, em Heligan, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1563, em Marsh, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 88 anos, e foi sepultado em Folke, Dorset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter Fauntleroy родился в 1475 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени John Fauntleroy Esq было 59 лет, а матери, которую звали Baroness Elizabeth Wadham, 50. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Flammock около 1505 г. в местности хелиган, корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1563 г. в местности марш, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 88 лет и был похоронен в местности фолк, дорсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Peter Fauntleroy nació en 1475, en Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, John Fauntleroy Esq, tenía 59 años y su mamá, Baroness Elizabeth Wadham, tenía 50 años. Se casó con Jane Flammock aproximadamente 1505, en Heligan, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1563, en Marsh, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 88 años, y fue sepultado en Folke, Dorset, Inglaterra.
